prompt:
Ultra-realistic lifestyle portrait of a young woman browsing music in a vintage independent record store. She stands between rows of vinyl records and CDs, reaching toward the camera while holding a music album, creating a dynamic shallow-depth-of-field effect. Medium-length dark brown bob haircut, natural makeup, confident and relaxed expression, direct eye contact with the camera.
The record store is filled with wooden shelves packed with CDs, vinyl records, and music memorabilia. Large retro music posters and album covers decorate the walls, creating a nostalgic indie atmosphere. Genre signs such as "ALT-ROCK" and "90s INDIE" are visible throughout the shop. Warm ambient indoor lighting, cozy vintage aesthetic, authentic music-lover culture.
Shot with a professional full-frame camera using a wide-aperture lens (f/1.8), producing strong foreground blur and cinematic background bokeh. The extended hand and album in the foreground are slightly out of focus while the subject's face remains sharp. Natural color grading, soft film tones, editorial photography style, indie bookstore and record-shop vibe, candid moment, highly detailed textures, realistic skin, ultra-photorealistic, 4K, magazine-quality lifestyle photography.
Negative Prompt:
low resolution, blurry face, overexposed lighting, cartoon, CGI, illustration, anime, distorted hands, extra fingers, duplicate records, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text overlay, frame, border, oversaturated colors, unrealistic skin, motion blur, noise, artifacts, poorly lit scene.
